features.description: Master feature key. Off = the whole module is invisible: no admin surfaces, no validate/preview endpoints, no coupon rendering on invoices.
Unlocks free_period, first_month_free, bogo discount types. Small tier is limited to percent + fixed_amount + free_shipping.
Enables POST /api/v1/coupons/bulk-issue — batch-create N unique campaign codes. Small tenants create coupons one at a time.
Enables applying multiple coupons to a single invoice with defined precedence order. When off, one coupon per invoice.
Enterprise-only. Extends retention 7y -> 10y for financial audit alignment.

Enables the /api/v1/coupons/report endpoint + the weekly GenerateCouponUsageReportJob. All tiers get the report; the feature key exists to allow admins to disable the automated email fanout independently of the endpoint.
Enables the tenant.{id}.coupon-redemptions broadcast channel + opt-in CouponRedeemedNotification. Disabled by default (high volume — most tenants don't want per-redemption pings).
